textPlain: There is a professor Jiri Demel in Prague with Czech Technical University with a book "Graphs and their applications". Is this in any way a tribute to him? He is very wholesome guy that tought me graphs :).edit: link https://kix.fsv.cvut.cz/~demel/grafy/
Isn't this upriver/downriver/elevation terminology just a fancy/ignorant way of saying "topological ordering"?
and prof. Demlova too :) nice to see fellows from my alma mater here!https://math.fel.cvut.cz/en/people/demlova/
